hero.subtitle: Your grow journal in your pocket
hero.description: Cannafriend helps you track plants, photos, tasks, and reminders without turning your grow into an endless spreadsheet.
hero.imageAlt: Handwritten illustration of a grow desk with a plant and a phone showing grow records

plants.title: Organized plants
plants.description: Profiles by plant, stage, and key details so you know where things stand.

journal.title: Fast journal
journal.description: Photos, observations, and tasks without writing too much.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.description: Watering, care, and next steps visible before they slip.

photoAi.title: Photo AI
photoAi.description: A first look to spot signals and organize questions about the plant.

flow.title: Three small habits, fewer big doubts
flow.description: Record just enough: which plant it is, what you did, and what comes next. That gives you context to learn from the grow.
flow.imageAlt: Handwritten illustration of a grow journal with reminders and a plant

plants.title: Register your plants
plants.description: Save stage, strain, photos, and notes without mixing up different plants.

journal.title: Log what matters
journal.description: Add watering, changes, observations, and photos in seconds.

care.title: Remember the next care task
care.description: Use reminders to come back to the next watering, checkup, or task.

ai.title: Help when a leaf starts saying something
ai.description: AI does not replace your judgment, but it helps organize symptoms, review photos, and think through next steps with more context.

freeTaste.title: Free preview
freeTaste.description: One photo-based question to try the approach before using the full assistant.

premiumChat.title: Premium chat
premiumChat.description: Conversations with history and deeper follow-up for your plants.

android.sectionDescription: The app is not on Play Store yet. The official download uses a versioned APK and a short guide for enabling browser installs.
android.cardDescription: Scan the QR or download from this device. The QR opens this guide before downloading the file.
android.comingSoonDescription: The landing is ready. Configure NEXT_PUBLIC_ANDROID_APK_URL to show the download button and QR.
android.safetyNote: Download only from the official Cannafriend link. If your phone shows warnings, check that the domain matches.
android.qrLabel: QR code to the Android installation guide
android.imageAlt: Handwritten illustration of an Android phone downloading an app
android.pageDescription: This guide covers the current Android flow: download the APK, allow installation from the browser, and close that permission afterward.
android.trustDescription: The APK should come from the official Cannafriend link. Do not install copies forwarded by chat or files with changed names.
android.guideDescription: Exact labels can vary between Pixel, Samsung, Motorola, and other brands, but the general flow is the same.

download.title: Download the file
download.description: Tap Download APK from this page. Android may ask you to confirm that you want to keep the file.

permission.title: Allow that source
permission.description: If Android blocks installation, open Settings from the warning and allow unknown app installs only for the browser you used.

install.title: Install Cannafriend
install.description: Return to the downloaded file and tap Install. When it finishes, open the app and sign in with your account.

cleanup.title: Close the permission
cleanup.description: After installing, you can go back to Settings and disable unknown app installs for that browser.

playProtect.title: Play Protect
playProtect.description: Android may scan apps installed outside Play Store. If a warning appears, read it before continuing.

permission.title: Per-app permission
permission.description: On current Android, the permission is usually per source: Chrome, Files, or another browser, not one global switch.

checksum.title: Checksum
checksum.withHash: The SHA-256 hash is visible in the download block so the file can be compared.
checksum.noHash: When you publish the final APK, add NEXT_PUBLIC_ANDROID_APK_SHA256 so users can verify it.

cta.title: Start by recording what you already do
cta.description: Create your account, add your first plant, and let Cannafriend help you keep context between watering, photos, and changes.

footer.hero: Cannafriend is a grow companion for plant records, journals, reminders, and AI-assisted questions in a simple flow.
